name: load-balancer
title: Azure Load Balancer — Standard Load Balancer
summary: Creates a Standard SKU L4 load balancer (public or internal frontend), backend address pools, health probes, load-balancing rules, and explicit outbound SNAT rules. Backend pool membership is the consumer's responsibility (NIC association or address-based).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: resource_group_name
module.description: Name of the existing resource group for the load balancer.

module.name: location
module.description: Azure region for the load balancer.

module.name: frontend_type
module.description: Frontend type: 'public' creates a Standard public IP; 'internal' binds to subnet_id with an optional static private IP.

module.name: subnet_id
module.description: Subnet ID for the internal frontend. Required when frontend_type = 'internal'.

module.name: private_ip_address
module.description: Static private IP for the internal frontend. Null = dynamic allocation.

module.name: zones
module.description: Availability zones for the frontend (e.g., [\"1\", \"2\", \"3\"] for zone-redundant). Empty = regional.

module.name: backend_pools
module.description: Logical names of backend address pools to create. Pool membership (NIC association or address-based) is the consumer's responsibility.

module.name: health_probes
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = optional(string, "Tcp") request_path = optional(string) interval_in_seconds = optional(number, 15) number_of_probes = optional(number, 2) }))
module.description: Health probes keyed by logical name.

module.name: rules
module.type: map(object({ frontend_port = number backend_port = number protocol = optional(string, "Tcp") backend_pool_key = string probe_key = optional(string) enable_floating_ip = optional(bool, false) idle_timeout_in_minutes = optional(number, 4) load_distribution = optional(string, "Default") disable_outbound_snat = optional(bool, true) }))
module.description: Load balancing rules keyed by logical name, referencing backend pools and probes by logical key.

module.name: outbound_rules
module.type: map(object({ backend_pool_key = string protocol = optional(string, "All") allocated_outbound_ports = optional(number, 1024) idle_timeout_in_minutes = optional(number, 4) }))
module.description: Explicit outbound SNAT rules (public frontend only). Preferred over implicit outbound SNAT.

outputs.name: lb_address
outputs.description: Frontend address: public IP for public frontends, private IP for internal frontends.

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical rule name to load balancing rule ID (Azure's analogue of listeners).

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical backend pool name to backend address pool ID. Associate NICs or addresses against these in the consumer root module.

outputs.name: probe_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical probe name to health probe ID.
